query:
SELECT 
  js.id AS session_id,
  js.email,
  js.step,
  js.userId,
  js.joiningFeePaidAt,
  js.mandateId AS session_mandateId,
  u.id AS user_id,
  u.name AS user_name,
  u.role,
  u.isActive
FROM join_sessions js
LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = js.userId
WHERE js.id = 300001;

SELECT id, userId, billingRequestId, mandateId, status, joiningFeePaidAt FROM gc_mandates WHERE billingRequestId = 'BRQ01KRPBQ61N5HRA1X8D36VFB1ZB';

SELECT id, userId, membershipTier, agentStatus, trainingStage, personalEmail FROM agent_crm_profiles WHERE userId = 9486760;
